query:
-- หาสัญญาหนี้เสียที่ row ล่าสุด (created_at สูงสุด) เป็น TXRTC amount=0
-- นี่คือกรณีที่ debtDb.ts จะใช้ created_at ของ TXRTC เป็น latestCreatedDate → batch ผิด
SELECT 
  c.contract_no,
  c.external_id,
  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as contracts_bad_debt,
  latest.external_id as latest_ext_id,
  latest.receipt_no as latest_receipt,
  CAST(latest.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as latest_amount,
  latest.created_at as latest_created_at,
  latest.updated_by as latest_updated_by
FROM contracts c
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT pt.contract_external_id,
         pt.external_id,
         pt.receipt_no,
         pt.amount,
         pt.created_at,
         pt.updated_by,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pt.contract_external_id ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC) as rn
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
) latest ON latest.contract_external_id = c.external_id AND latest.rn = 1
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.debt_status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND CAST(latest.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

-- นี่คือกรณีที่ debtDb.ts จะใช้ created_at ของ TXRTC เป็น latestCreatedDate → batch ผิด

  CAST(c.bad_debt_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as contracts_bad_debt,
  latest.external_id as latest_ext_id,
  latest.receipt_no as latest_receipt,
  CAST(latest.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as latest_amount,
  latest.created_at as latest_created_at,
  latest.updated_by as latest_updated_by
FROM contracts c
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT pt.contract_external_id,
         pt.external_id,
         pt.receipt_no,
         pt.amount,
         pt.created_at,
         pt.updated_by,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pt.contract_external_id ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC) as rn
  FROM payment_transactions pt
  WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND (pt.external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR pt.receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$')
) latest ON latest.contract_external_id = c.external_id AND latest.rn = 1
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND c.debt_status = 'หนี้เสีย'
  AND CAST(latest.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) = 0
  AND c.bad_debt_amount > 0
LIMIT 10;
